question: Will Sm metal (Western) spot price exceed 200 USD/kg on May 31, 2026?
textDescription:
This market resolves YES if Sm metal (Western) spot price exceeds 200 USD/kg on May 31, 2026.

What is being measured: Samarium metal (Sm, 99%+ purity) spot price in the Western market (ex-China Western assessment), USD/kg, on or nearest to May 31, 2026.

YES if: Western Sm metal spot price >= 200 USD/kg on May 31, 2026 NO if: Western Sm metal spot price < 200 USD/kg on May 31, 2026

Resolution sources (priority order):

Argus REE samarium metal — Western assessment

Asian Metal — samarium metal Western or ex-China prices

Fastmarkets (ex-Metal Pages) Sm metal Western spot

SMM samarium metal Western assessment
newsShortReason: Samarium metal prices are significantly below $200/kg, with recent prices around $10/kg.
newsKeyEvidence: As of May 20, 2026, samarium metal prices ranged from $9,583.75 to $9,842.77 per tonne, equating to approximately $9.58 to $9.84 per kilogram. ([www-old.metal.com](https://www-old.metal.com/Rare-Earth-Metals/?utm_source=openai)) | On May 19, 2026, samarium metal 99.5% min was priced at $10.44 per kilogram. ([scrapmonster.com](https://www.scrapmonster.com/metal-prices/samarium-oxides-999-min-price/956?utm_source=openai))
